description_long: This object is a light blue, clamshell-style handheld electronic device with two rectangular black screens, one on each half of the interior. The lower half features a cross-shaped directional pad, four circular action buttons, and two smaller rectangular buttons, all in black. The upper half has two sets of small speaker holes flanking the screen. A matching stylus, also light blue with a white tip, is positioned beside the device, indicating touch input functionality. The exterior casing is made of smooth plastic, with visible seams and ports for connectivity and charging. The overall design is compact and portable, with a robust hinge connecting the two halves.
description: A light blue, clamshell handheld electronic device with dual black screens, physical buttons, and a matching stylus. The design is compact, portable, and features a smooth plastic exterior.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing both screens, the full button layout, and the stylus placed to the right.
description_view_1: Side-front view highlighting the hinge, side ports, and the stylus more clearly separated from the device.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back casing, hinge, and various ports, with the stylus visible to the left.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view emphasizing the thickness of the upper screen and the hinge mechanism.
